case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SANTOS REYNALDO CHAN CAUICH

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES (ASSISTANT MANAGER) WHO IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301595). DEFENDANT SANTOS REYNALDO CHAN CAUICH IS NOT PRESENT. VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN CAUICH, SANTOS REYNALDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00, DEFENDANT TOOK OUT $8,849.18 LOAN BUT ONLY PAID $3,850. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO WAIVE AMOUNTS ABOVE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN CAUICH, SANTOS REYNALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES REQUESTING TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN CAUICH, SANTOS REYNALDO
